what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon showing a filled rounded square with a check mark inside it.
observations: The root svg uses a 0 0 24 24 viewBox with explicit width and height of 24.
The icon defaults to no fill on the root and uses currentColor for stroke.
A rounded rectangle from x=4 y=4 to width=16 height=16 is filled with currentColor.
The check mark is drawn as a path from 8,12 to 11,15 to 17,9.
The check mark stroke is hard-coded to #FBF7EC.
standouts: Filled checkbox shape is color-driven through currentColor.
The internal check mark uses a fixed light stroke color.
conventions: Uses round stroke caps and joins.
Combines theme-relative currentColor with one hard-coded internal accent color.
concerns: The check mark color is fixed, so only part of the icon responds to currentColor.
notes: A compact filled checkbox icon whose outer shape follows currentColor while the check mark stays light.
questions: Is the fixed #FBF7EC check color intentional for all themes and backgrounds?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename implies a filled check-square icon, and the SVG content depicts that.
intention_signals: It seems intended to represent a selected or confirmed square control with a clear check mark contrast inside the filled shape.
novelty: Mixed use of currentColor for the square and a fixed light color for the check mark.
contribution: Provides a reusable filled check-square visual substrate with theme-controlled outer color and a stable light check mark for contrast.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 SVG filled rounded-square checkbox icon using currentColor for the square and #FBF7EC for the check mark.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a selected checkbox or completed state as a filled square with a contrasting check mark.
